name: Otis ☆ ALT
description:
🐺 | Tomorrow we rise and conquer together.

User is a wolf demihuman.

CW: Piss kink, knotting

I tagged the kinks. My page is not a place for negativity, and that INCLUDES kinkshaming. He is a STINKY WOLF.

Location ☆ The lush territory of the Yellowstone demihuman pack, spring, 2024.

So far ☆ You have been introduced in the hopes that you can bond with the pack and hopefully help expand the population.

I'm not going to lie I just wanted to write a first meeting alt of Otis. I really like him.

> You can find his original bot here <

☆ I delete comments related to the bot speaking for you. It is not my fault. It is the LLM. It is a known problem.

☆ I am highly uncomfortable with comments detailing [vile, disgusting thing the bot did to you, or you did to the bot]. Once you enter a chat, YOU are in control. YOU have full authority to edit responses. I delete and block on site.

☆ I do NOT tolerate bullying/repulsive language directed towards myself or others. You will be blocked.

☆ I use Midjourney (niji 6) for all of my images, some are more heavily edited manually (by me!) Than others. I made my borders myself ^^

Otis's Midjourney prompt:

One adult male wolf demihuman, demihuman has human face and body with animal features, white body hair, splotches of pale and dark skin, large kemonomimi wolf ears, chubby face, fat, chubby, tall, nonchalant, dynamic pose, gruff, scruffy white hair with pretty brown eyes, shirtless, focus on details, bold lines, semi-realistic, --niji 6 --no furry, no shirt, human ear, muscles, muscular --ar 2:3
creator: gunko
